page_metadata.biotools__summary: Very efficient phylogenetic software for reconstructing maximum-likelihood trees and assessing branch supports with the ultrafast bootstrap approximation. It is based on the IQPNNI algorithm with 10-fold speedup together with substantially additional features.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Very efficient phylogenetic software for reconstructing maximum-likelihood trees and assessing branch supports with the ultrafast bootstrap approximation. It is based on the IQPNNI algorithm with 10-fold speedup together with substantially additional features.
